title: Night Vision - OFC
description: This texture makes your Minecraft look brighter.
body:
![night vision](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2844bb4cb91011d6b96306017564d2c84c4c55df_0.webp)

### NEED OPTIFINE

Night Vision is a texture pack that keeps your entire Minecraft world bright 🌟—just like having a permanent Night Vision potion effect. No commands, mods, or items needed! It’s great for exploring caves, building, recording videos, or simply playing with clearer visibility.

How to Install 📥

Download the .zip file (do not unzip it).
Open your resourcepacks folder:
Press Windows + R
Type %AppData% and press Enter
Go to .minecraft > resourcepacks
Place the .zip file inside the folder.
Launch Minecraft and go to:
Options > Resource Packs
Enable the pack and move it to the top of the list.

### Required Settings ⚙️ (Important!)
**Options > Video Settings > Quality > Custom Colors: ON**
